title: API key CRUD endpoints
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/signals/keys: generates key_ prefixed ID, SHA-256 hashes key, stores with tier, returns plaintext key only at creation
GET /api/v1/signals/keys: lists all keys for account (no secrets), includes last_used_at
DELETE /api/v1/signals/keys/{id}: sets revoked_at, key no longer valid
